Canterbury Christ Church University revealed this afternoon that the UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) had confirmed a case of meningitis in one of its students. If you can’t read it the patient has suddenly started suffering from a tingly tongue it’s not painful but really distracting and almost constant DR says most likely cause of this kind of symptom is a mild food allergy however sometimes it can be a sign of a dangerous health condition. Many patients unknowingly suffer from a condition called oral allergy syndrome (also known as pollen food syndrome) usually triggered by eating raw vegetables, fruit and nuts. The syndrome occurs when the immune system confuses the proteins found in certain raw foods as a threat. The good news is the condition is rarely serious

NCP have unfortunately cooked the goose that was laying golden eggs, they had all the infrastructure and customers were coming to them, all they had to do is sit back and enjoy the money coming in. Unfortunately they got a bit of a reputation of being difficult when it came to dealing with them when it came to supposed 'parking infringements', and so folks have voted with their feet and simply stopped using them.

They are the familiar grey concrete behemoths that have dwarfed shoppers and offered a sanctuary for their cars for some 95 years. But NCP's yellow lettered multi-storey complexes could soon be consigned to history after it was announced it had fallen into £305million debts and administration. Assessors will now be looking at the viability of each of its 340 locations, and some sites may need to be closed as a result.
  • 47 comments
  • share NCP's best and worst car parks: Most expensive to highest crime rate

I was seriously ill in hospital following major surgery. I had a picc line inserted as my veins collapsed due to multiple blood draws and IVs. The radiographer who inserted the line said I must ensure anyone who touched it had cleaned their hands and also flushed the line both before and after use. I challenged one ‘nurse’ who barely spoke English after she didn’t flush the line before use and she said it wasn’t necessary. Next thing I contracted sepsis and the source was found to be the picc line… RIP young man.

Khan's Lawless Labour London.

The team told how the two robbers struck while manager Tony Poole, 33, was busy loading several bikes onto a roof rack of his car in preparation for a race in the Peak District last weekend. Having loaded two and locked them in place, he stepped away from the vehicle, parked in a Dover Park Drive in Putney. It was then, at around 2.55pm, that the thieves seized their opportunity, clambering onto the roof of the car in a bid to rip the carbon Handsling A1R0evoS racing bikes.
